general.engineConfigDesc: Read-only. Edit system.yaml to change these values.
general.runtimeSettings: Runtime-mutable settings. Changes take effect immediately.

providers.title: LLM Providers
providers.description: Configure which AI provider powers your mind.
providers.ollamaInstructions: Install Ollama from ollama.com, then run: ollama serve
providers.cloudInstructions: Set one as environment variable and restart:

mind.name: Name
mind.noMindDescription: Personality and OCEAN configuration will appear when a mind is active.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: Conversational style and behavior traits. Changes apply immediately to new conversations.

ocean.title: OCEAN — Big Five Personality
ocean.description: Core personality model that shapes how the mind thinks and communicates.

safety.title: Safety Guardrails
safety.description: Content filtering, PII protection, and custom rules.
safety.contentFilterDesc: Controls which input and output patterns are blocked.
safety.childSafeModeDesc: All content must be appropriate for children under 10
safety.childSafeWarning: Child Safe Mode active. Content filter, PII protection, and financial confirmation are enforced automatically.
safety.financialConfirmationDesc: Require explicit confirmation before executing financial actions (payments, transfers, trades)
safety.piiProtectionDesc: Automatically redacts personal data (emails, phones, CPFs, API keys) from AI responses
safety.guardrailsDesc: Absolute rules injected into the system prompt. Built-in rules cannot be removed.

filterTooltips.none: No content filtering. All messages pass through unfiltered.
filterTooltips.standard: Blocks harmful content: violence, weapons, self-harm, hacking, illegal activities.
filterTooltips.strict: Blocks harmful + adult content, substances, gambling, hate speech, manipulation.

llmBrain.title: LLM Parameters & Brain
llmBrain.description: Model parameters and memory system configuration (read-only).

voiceClarity.title: Microphone input quality
voiceClarity.alertBody: Windows is running a noise-suppression APO on "{{device}}" that can block speech detection. Enable WASAPI exclusive mode to bypass it.
voiceClarity.alreadyExclusive: Exclusive mode is active — APO chain bypassed.
voiceClarity.noIssues: No capture-APO issues detected on this system.
voiceClarity.enableSuccess: Exclusive mode enabled and applied immediately.
voiceClarity.enableSuccessRestart: Exclusive mode saved. Restart the pipeline to apply.
voiceClarity.disableSuccess: Exclusive mode disabled. Restart to return to shared mode.

exportImport.title: Export / Import
exportImport.description: Download or restore your mind data. Your data, your sovereignty.
exportImport.confirmDescription: This will import data from "{{filename}}". Existing mind data may be affected. This action cannot be undone.
exportImport.gdprNote: GDPR Art. 20 compliant — your data in a portable, machine-readable format.
